Welcome To CIRA Pte Ltd

Providing Meaningful Data

CIRA (Credit Information Reporting Agency) PTE Limited is Fiji’s leading provider of credit information, helping both businesses and consumers make informed financial decisions. By offering comprehensive credit reports, credit alerts, and monitoring services, CIRA enables its clients to assess creditworthiness, mitigate financial risks, and foster a more transparent credit environment. Through collaboration with the Reserve Bank of Fiji, CIRA supports the nation’s financial ecosystem by ensuring accurate and secure credit data is accessible to its members.

For More Info

How can we help

You can be part of the solution by registering as a Credit Information Provider (CIP) as well as a Credit Report Recipient (CRR) with the Reserve Bank of Fiji and becoming a CIRA member.

Credit reports we supply

CIRA supplies credit reports for both individuals and businesses.

How much do credit reports cost

See here for more information.

Our Products

Credit Alert (Monitor) Services

Monitor alerts are an essential service when managing credit exposure by helping forecast early identification of those customers who may become delinquent.

My Credit File (Personal/Consumer)

To obtain a copy please contact us via email customercare@cira.com.fj

My Credit File (Business)

Here at CIRA we strive to provide accurate and up to date information from providers to help you make informed decisions.
